title: France to expand nuclear arsenal as Europe’s trust in U.S. falters
summary_full: Macron says his nation will bring European neighbors into nuclear military drills and may let them host nuclear-capable fighters planes for the first time.
summary_public: Macron says his nation will bring European neighbors into nuclear military drills and may let them host nuclear-capable fighters planes for the first time.

FR.label: neutral
FR.evidence: France to expand nuclear arsenal as Europe’s trust in U.S. falters
